fields.title: Convert smart/deep/rush into ordinary agents
fields.description: Tau currently exposes smart/deep/rush as virtual mode agents built from prompt mode presets, and reserves mode names so they cannot be represented as normal agent .md definitions. Removing modes requires these three names to remain spawnable through the agent tool without depending on prompt-mode infrastructure.
fields.design: Add bundled agent definitions for smart, deep, and rush under extensions/tau/agents using the existing agent frontmatter contract. Move their prompt bodies out of src/prompt/modes into agent system prompts, keep their default model/thinking/tool/spawn policy explicit in agent definitions, and allow normal agents.* settings overrides for model/thinking/tools/spawns. Remove the virtual mode-agent path from AgentRegistry. Delete plan as a virtual agent.
fields.acceptance_criteria: agent list includes smart, deep, and rush as normal bundled agents. AgentRegistry loads them from agent definitions rather than prompt mode presets. settings agents.smart/deep/rush can configure model, thinking, tools, and spawns using the same path as other agents. Project or user files named smart.md/deep.md/rush.md follow normal agent override precedence. plan is not spawnable unless introduced later as an explicit agent definition. Tests cover smart/deep/rush discovery and configuration without prompt mode code.
